title: Science Fair Abstract
text:
## Science Fair Abstract

**Title:** How {adjective} {plural noun} Affect {emotion}

**Student:** {person}, Grade {number}

**Hypothesis:** If a {animal} eats {food}, it will {verb} {adverb}.

**Method:** Built a {color} {object} and spent {number} hours {verb ending in -ing} in the {place}.

**Results:** The control group {past-tense verb}; the test group made a {sound}.

**Conclusion:** Science is {adjective}.

**Future work:** Repeat with a {vehicle}.
